text.title: go-http-handlers Output Contract
text.summary: Required server.go shape (middleware order + timeouts + shutdown) and handler shape (thin, ctx-aware).

section.title: JSON Schema

example.note: gin.New + explicit middleware + timeouts + thin handler with c.Request.Context().

list.item: Middleware order: Recovery, RequestID, Logger, Auth, then domain.
http.Server has all four timeouts set explicitly (no zero values).
Every handler is < 40 lines; no business logic.
c.Request.Context() plumbed to every service/repo call; no context.Background().
Validation happens in request-struct binding tags, not handler body.
main() registers a SIGINT/SIGTERM listener that calls srv.Shutdown(ctx) with a 10-15s drain.
